name: Quiche Lorraine with Bacon and Asparagus
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a 9-inch pie pan with the pastry.
2. Cover the bottom of the pan with the sliced Swiss cheese, asparagus, and crumbled bacon.
3. In a large bowl, beat the eggs with the flour, salt, cayenne, nutmeg, milk, and melted butter until well combined.
4. Pour the custard mixture over the cheese, asparagus, and bacon in the pie pan.
5. Bake at 375°F for 40 minutes or until set.
6. Allow to cool slightly before cutting into wedges.
7. Serve warm.
